2603.20094.title: LLM-Enhanced Semantic Data Integration of Electronic Component Qualifications in the Aerospace Domain
2603.20094.paper_summary: Large manufacturing companies face challenges in information retrieval due to data silos maintained by different departments, leading to inconsistencies and misalignment across databases. This paper presents an experience in integrating and retrieving qualification data for electronic components used in satellite board design. Due to data silos, designers cannot immediately determine the qualification status of individual components. However, this process is critical during the planning phase, when assembly drawings are issued before production, to optimize new qualifications and avoid redundant efforts. To address this, we propose a pipeline that uses Virtual Knowledge Graphs for a unified view over heterogeneous data sources and LLMs to enhance retrieval and reduce manual effort in data cleansing. The retrieval of qualifications is then performed through an Ontology-based Data Access approach for structured queries and a vector search mechanism for retrieving qualifications based on similar textual properties. We perform a comparative cost-benefit analysis, demonstrating that the proposed pipeline also outperforms approaches relying solely on LLMs, such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), in terms of long-term efficiency.
2603.20094.paper_summary_zh: 大型製造公司面臨信息檢索的挑戰，因為不同部門維護的數據孤島導致數據庫之間的不一致和不對齊。本文介紹了一個整合和檢索用於衛星板設計的電子元件的資格數據的經驗。由於數據孤島，設計師無法立即確定單個元件的資格狀態。然而，這一過程在規劃階段至關重要，因為在生產之前會發佈裝配圖，以優化新的資格並避免重複努力。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一個管道，利用虛擬知識圖譜對異構數據源進行統一視圖，並使用LLMs來增強檢索並減少數據清理中的人工努力。然後，通過基於本體的數據訪問方法進行資格的檢索，以進行結構化查詢，並使用向量搜索機制根據相似的文本屬性檢索資格。我們進行了比較成本效益分析，證明所提出的管道在長期效率方面也優於僅依賴LLMs的方法，例如檢索增強生成（RAG）。
2603.20094.author: Antonio De Santis et.al.
2603.20094.authors: Antonio De Santis, Marco Balduini, Matteo Belcao, Andrea Proia, Marco Brambilla, Emanuele Della Valle
